00:18. Action: Pick up pot. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:21. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), sink, faucet (turned off). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:22. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), sink, faucet (turned off). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:25. Action: Toggle on faucet. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), faucet (turned on), sink. pot is inside robot gripper. Auditory observation: water runs in sink.
00:28. Action: Toggle off faucet. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), sink, faucet (turned off). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:31. Action: Put pot in sink. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), sink, faucet (turned off). pot is inside sink. pot is on the right of soap bottle. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:34. Action: Pick up pot. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), sink, faucet (turned off). pot is inside robot gripper.
00:36. Action: Move to house plant. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), house plant (empty), sink, faucet (turned off). house plant is on the left of soap bottle. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.
00:38. Action: Move to house plant. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), house plant (empty), sink. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.

[Observation at the end of 00:39]
Action: Pour liquid from pot into house plant. Visual observation: pot (empty and clean), house plant (empty), sink. house plant is on top of third countertop. pot is inside robot gripper.

Q: Infer from [Robot actions and observations before 00:39] or [Observation at the end of 00:39], briefly explain what happened at 00:39 and what caused the failure.
A:

response: At 00:39, the robot tried to pour from the pot into the house plant, but the pot was still empty so nothing was transferred. The failure was caused earlier at 00:25–00:28, when the faucet was turned on and then off without actually filling the pot (it remained empty even after being placed in and picked up from the sink at 00:31–00:34).
